mapper.select:
SELECT m.* FROM menus m JOIN menu_roles mr ON mr.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE mr.role_key = #{roleKey} AND m.use_yn = TRUE AND m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} 0
ORDER BY m.parent_id NULLS FIRST, m.sort_order ASC, m.menu_id ASC
SELECT m.* FROM menus m WHERE m.menu_id = #{menuId}
SELECT menu_id FROM menus WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND menu_type = 'GROUP' AND name = 'Boards' AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY menu_id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus(parent_id, name, path, icon, sort_order, use_yn, menu_type, board_id, tenant_id) VALUES(#{parentId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{menuType}, #{boardId}, #{tenantId})
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_roles(menu_id, role_key) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{roleKey}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM menus m WHERE m.board_id = #{boardId} LIMIT 1
